basics.name: Daniel Alfonso Arteta Salazar
basics.label: Economics | Data Analysis | Actuarial Science | Programming
basics.summary: Economics professional with a focus on data analysis, backed by solid training in information technologies and data science that enables the management, processing, and interpretation of information using specialized tools. I have experience in rigorous data analysis and the preparation of technical documents and analytical reports aimed at supporting strategic decision-making. I am characterized by a proactive, solution-oriented, and adaptable approach, as well as the ability to integrate technical knowledge and economic analysis to generate effective solutions, working collaboratively and with a strong institutional commitment.

work.name: Ministerio del Trabajo
work.summary: Technical lead of a state incentive program for labor formalization, responsible for the management, cleansing, and processing of the program's databases and the Ministry's internal control systems. I developed quantitative and statistical analyses of the information for the preparation of technical reports and control dashboards, aimed at monitoring indicators, evaluating results, and supporting decision-making. I also provided data-driven technical support for the design, development, and implementation of labor formalization strategies and public policies.
highlights: Development and maintenance of the company's web application

work.name: Registraduria Nacional de Colombia
work.summary: Execution of various functions including data management and presentation for report generation, participation in the logistics and development of electoral processes, and public service ensuring efficient and satisfactory service.
highlights: Support in data management and presentation for report generation
Support in the logistics and development of electoral processes

work.name: Coally
work.summary: Development and maintenance of the web application for a Colombian startup dedicated to connecting companies with young talent. With emphasis on frontend development, user database management, and quality testing.
highlights: Development and maintenance of the company's web application
